pricing.cancellationNotice: If an appointment is not cancelled more than 24 hours before the scheduled time, a cancellation fee of 750 CZK per 30 min will be charged. Thank you for your understanding.

insurance.heading: We cooperate with health insurance companies

items.question: How can I book an appointment?
items.answer: You can book an appointment by phone at +420 776 377 100 or by email at recepce@lbclinic.cz. You can also book through the contact form on our website.

items.question: How to get to us and where to park?
answer: Public transport: We are located just a 5-minute walk from the Rajská zahrada metro station (line B) — use the underpass.
By car: Parking is available for our patients directly in the private courtyard of the building.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, credit/debit cards, and bank transfers. You can find a QR code for payment below the Pricing section.

items.question: What happens during the first visit?
items.answer: During the first visit, we perform a thorough examination of the oral cavity, including an X-ray and initial photo documentation. We assess the overall condition of the teeth and gums and propose an individual treatment plan. It takes approximately 30–45 minutes.

items.question: What to do in case of acute pain?
answer: Contact us by phone at +420 776 377 100 and we will try to schedule you as soon as possible. Outside our office hours, we recommend the dental emergency services:
Nemocnice Na Františku, Praha 1, tel. 222 924 268, Spálená 12, Praha 1, tel. 222 924 268
Fakultní Thomayerova nemocnice s poliklinikou, Vídeňská 800, Praha 4, pavilon B1, tel. 261 083 546
Children's dental emergency at Motol University Hospital, V Úvalu 84, Praha 5 contact: tel. 224 433 653; 224 433 652, 224 433 101, 224 433 120

items.question: Post-treatment care recommendations?
items.answer: After each treatment, we provide detailed aftercare instructions.

items.question: What dental tools do you recommend for home care?
items.answer: Soft toothbrushes are generally the most effective. Soft bristles are the most efficient against dental plaque while being gentle on the gums. In contrast, a hard toothbrush can significantly damage both the gums and the teeth themselves. Daily use of an interdental brush is also an important prerequisite for thorough cleaning of the teeth. A regular toothbrush cannot reach the interdental spaces where plaque also forms. Interdental brushes come in different sizes distinguished by color — our dental hygienist will help you choose the right ones.

items.text: Absolute satisfaction. Dr. Vernerová is very kind and has a wonderful approach to patients, which I really appreciate as someone who has panic attacks at the dentist.
The dentist was very kind and professional. She correctly identified the issues in the oral cavity and was happy to accommodate their resolution.
Everyone was pleasant and helpful. Dr. Vernerová was accommodating, kind, and has a wonderful approach with children.

treatments.heading: Our Treatments
treatments.intro: Our clinic provides a comprehensive range of dental services under one roof. A team of specialized professionals covers all areas of modern dental care. We rely on precision, an individual approach to treatment, and open communication with patients. We believe that top-quality dentistry and a welcoming environment go hand in hand.

items.title: Preventive Checkup
items.desc: A thorough examination focused on early detection of problems and maintaining healthy teeth for years to come.

items.title: Dental Hygiene
items.desc: Professional teeth cleaning as the foundation of prevention — effective protection against cavities and gum disease.

items.title: Teeth Whitening
items.desc: Gentle teeth whitening for a brighter smile and removal of unwanted enamel discolorations.

items.title: Pediatric Dentistry
items.desc: We take care of children's teeth from the very first tooth. Regular prevention lays the foundation for a beautiful smile for life.

items.title: Wisdom Teeth Extraction
items.desc: Safe and gentle removal of wisdom teeth with an emphasis on minimal post-operative discomfort.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.desc: A reliable and permanent replacement for a missing tooth using modern implant systems.

items.title: Aesthetic Dental Fillings
items.desc: Tooth-colored fillings for treating cavities and restoring the natural appearance and function of teeth.

items.title: Orthodontics
items.desc: Correction of tooth and jaw alignment for a healthy bite and an aesthetically even smile.

items.title: Endodontics
items.desc: Root canal treatment that can save a tooth and prevent the need for extraction.

items.title: Periodontitis Treatment
items.desc: Effective treatment of gum inflammation and periodontitis aimed at stopping tissue loss and stabilizing teeth.

items.title: Dentures and Prostheses
items.desc: High-quality removable prostheses custom-made for comfortable and reliable daily wear.

items.title: Ceramic Veneers
items.desc: Thin ceramic shells bonded to the front of teeth for a perfect shape, color, and radiant smile.

items.title: Dental Bridge
items.desc: A fixed solution for replacing one or more missing teeth, supported by adjacent abutment teeth.

items.title: Dental Crown
items.desc: An individually crafted crown that restores the shape, strength, and natural appearance of a tooth.

items.title: Sedation and Anesthesia Treatment
items.desc: Procedures under conscious sedation or general anesthesia ensure a calm, pain-free, and anxiety-free experience.

items.title: Complete Smile Makeover
items.desc: A total smile transformation combining aesthetic and functional solutions for an entirely new beginning.

items.title: Oral Surgery
items.desc: Surgical procedures in the oral cavity performed with maximum precision and a focus on a gentle approach.

items.title: Dental Emergency
items.desc: Prompt help for acute toothache focused on immediate relief and prevention of further complications.

items.title: X-Ray Diagnostics
items.desc: Modern 2D and 3D X-ray imaging for precise treatment planning and reliable diagnostics.
